nasb.text: The prophets prophesy falsely, And the priests rule on their own authority; And My people love it so! But what will you do at the end of it?

esv.text: the prophets prophesy falsely, and the priests rule at their direction; my people love to have it so, but what will you do when the end comes?

cnv.text: 先知說假預言， 祭司憑己意把持權柄。 我的子民竟喜愛這樣， 到了結局你們怎麼辦呢？”

ccb.text: 就是先知说假预言， 祭司滥用权力， 我的子民却以此为乐。 但当最后的结局来临时， 他们还能做什么呢？
